product_surfaces: internal/cache source, identity, remote revision, and conflict state
mocks_used: fake GitCode client test double for external GitCode adapter dependency only; service SyncToCache and real cache behavior remain on the product path

scenarios.description: TestFailureModes runs the service failure suite through SyncToCache and verifies typed errors, visible messages, recovery guidance, failed event evidence, and cache-state guarantees for all required scenarios.
The failure-timeout-network-unavailable subtest verifies ErrNetworkUnavailable with DOC-123 retry guidance, failed sync-event evidence, and unchanged source/version/conflict cache state.

The failure-rate-limited-retry-after subtest verifies ErrRateLimited RetryAfter propagation, visible retry-after message, failed event evidence, and no partial writes; TestSyncRetry supports retry-delay behavior before a successful final commit.

TestFailureModes includes partial response, auth expiry, remote id collision, cache corruption, lock contention, missing remote record, and oversized payload subtests, each with SyncToCache typed-error and executable cache-state assertions.

notes.offline: Validation uses local Go commands and in-memory/cache-local test state only; live GitCode network validation remains disabled.
notes.target_product_path: The run script exercises production service behavior by running Go tests that call SyncToCache against real cache accessors, with only the external GitCode dependency stubbed.
notes.failure_behavior: If any required failure guard is missing or mutates cache state incorrectly, the service tests or this run script fail non-zero.
